creator: mat@mat.cc
text:

|> wrote:

|> 
|> Which is its right place, yes.
| 
| Fair enough. I have no idea what that target is, as it isn't described in
| bsd.port.mk ;-)

Yes, I think it's by design, those who need it know, the other don't need
to know about because there's no way they'll need it ;-)

-- 
Mathieu Arnold
